task: same corpus, same box, local Ollama (qwen2.5:14b + nomic-embed-text)

zep.method: temporal knowledge graph (Graphiti + Neo4j, local Ollama)
zep.note: Zep's engine runs fully local, but entity/edge extraction is done by the same local Ollama model (qwen2.5:14b). Local structured extraction is lossy, so the KG is sparse and recall reflects local-model extraction quality -- not Zep Cloud (which uses frontier models). This is the honest cost of running Zep's graph approach on a fully-local, air-gapped stack.

structural: Perseus --offline: zero network, measured FTS5 recall 1.0
Perseus 12MB static binary, one data file
Competitors need a DB/graph/agent server process
Perseus core works with zero cloud dependency
Perseus transaction+valid time + tamper-evident hash chain
